locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

locations.name: Kitanglad Mountain Range
locations.summary: The Kitanglad Mountain Range dominates the northern central portion of the province of Bukidnon, Philippines.

relations.subject: Slaty-backed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax

relations.subject: Slaty-backed jungle flycatcher

relations.subject: Slaty-backed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Slaty-backed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Slaty-backed jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: Its main threat is habitat loss through deforestation, mining, land conversion and slash-and-burn
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
